data.title: Anthropic halts access to Fable 5, Mythos 5 due to US national security concerns, following government directive.
data.description: Anthropic, a prominent company in the AI industry, has taken immediate action by disabling its main AI models following a directive from the US government over national security worries. This decision has affected a significant portion of their operations, impacting numerous users and stakeholders in the process. The move comes as a response to specific national security threats that have prompted this swift and decisive measure. The exact number of models deactivated and the extent of the impact on the company's business remain undisclosed at this time.

data.title: Top crypto exchanges scrap SpaceX IPO allocations, forcing refunds. SpaceX launched IPO on Nasdaq; crypto users miss out on tokenized exposure.
data.description: SpaceX, owned by Elon Musk, successfully completed its highly-anticipated IPO on the Nasdaq last Friday. However, individuals using cryptocurrencies hoping for tokenized shares of the IPO were disappointed as allocations did not materialize as expected.

data.title: SpaceX Stock Closes Up 19% In Record-Shattering IPO Debut (CORRECTED)
data.description: Space Exploration Technologies Corp. (NASDAQ: SPCX) made history by closing its first day of trading at $160.95 per share, marking a 19.22% gain from its $135 IPO price. The company had the largest IPO ever, raising $75 billion through the sale of 555.6 million primary shares. Shares opened at $150, indicating strong institutional and retail demand above the offering price. This successful debut signifies significant market value for SpaceX compared to other large U.S. companies. You can find more details on the news and price activity.

data.title: Franklin Templeton, BNP Paribas support tokenization for EU markets to enhance capital efficiency and liquidity.
data.description: Franklin Templeton and BNP Paribas are advocating for the use of tokenization to enhance capital efficiency and liquidity in European Union capital markets. They believe that by utilizing this technology, firms can unlock significant benefits including faster and more cost-effective transactions, increased access to global investors, and improved liquidity for assets. This move is crucial in the financial sector, as it can potentially revolutionize the way assets are managed and traded. By embracing tokenization, companies could experience a boost in capital efficiency and liquidity, leading to enhanced market performance and increased investor interest.

data.title: AI is revolutionizing contract drafting for legal teams, speeding up processes and improving quality. Lawyers' roles are shifting towards judgment-based work. #legaltech #AI
data.description: The utilization of AI in drafting contracts is revolutionizing legal procedures by significantly accelerating processes, improving quality, and transitioning lawyers towards more judgment-focused tasks. This advanced technology is proving to be incredibly beneficial in the legal sector, increasing efficiency and allowing legal professionals to focus on higher-value work. Follow the link for further information on this innovative transformation in legal workflows.

data.title: Arcadia Biosciences (RKDA) Announces Closing of $4 Million Private Placement Priced At-The-Market Under Nasdaq Rules
data.description: On June 12, 2026, Arcadia Biosciences, Inc. ® (Nasdaq: RKDA), a company specializing in wellness products, completed a private placement under Nasdaq rules. The placement involved the sale of 3,883,496 shares of its common stock (or pre-funded warrants), along with Series A-1 preferred investment options for buying up to 3,883,496 common stock shares, and Series A-2 preferred investment options for purchasing up to 3,883,496 common stock shares. Each share was priced at $1.03.

data.title: BNB Cup 2026 kicks off, offering $2M in prizes, boosting ecosystem as BNB climbs to $605.
data.description: BNB Chain has launched the BNB Cup 2026, a campaign centered around football, offering a substantial $2 million in prizes. This initiative aims to boost ecosystem engagement, particularly as BNB's value shows signs of recovery, reaching $605. The BNB Cup 2026 is expected to attract significant participation and interest within the community.

data.title: Hungary will decriminalize crypto trading, reversing strict 2025 rules to align with EU standards and boost the local market.
data.description: Hungary has announced that it will overturn its crypto regulations by 2025, which had previously prescribed prison sentences for violations. This decision is significant as it demonstrates Hungary's intent to comply with EU regulations and revitalize its domestic cryptocurrency sector. The move is aimed at fostering a more favorable environment for crypto businesses and investors, in a bid to boost the local market.

data.title: ComEd Continues Power Restoration Following Two Powerful Storms
data.description: In northern Illinois, ComEd teams are working diligently to restore power to customers affected by severe storms that hit the region on Wednesday. The volatile weather included intense rain, frequent lightning, and high wind gusts, leading to considerable damage. As of now, crews are concentrating on repairing and bringing back service to remaining pockets of customers impacted by the storms. Multiple rounds of severe weather caused disruptions to ComEd's power supply, and efforts are ongoing to address the aftermath of the storms.

data.title: Belite Bio Completes Rolling Submission of New Drug Application to U.S. Food and Drug Administration for Tinlarebant for the Treatment of Stargardt Disease Type 1
data.description: Belite Bio, Inc (NASDAQ: BLTE) has completed its submission of a New Drug Application (NDA) to the FDA for tinlarebant, a once-daily oral therapy targeting Stargardt disease type 1 (STGD1). This rare inherited retinal disease, affecting an estimated 53,000 individuals in the U.S., results in progressive vision loss due to mutations in the ABCA4 gene. Tinlarebant aims to address the significant unmet medical needs in treating STGD1 as there are currently no approved treatment options for this condition.

data.title: Republic Technologies Inc. Provides Bi-Weekly Update On Annual Filings
data.description: Republic Technologies Inc. shared an update regarding its management cease trade order (MCTO) in relation to the filing of its audited annual financial statements and management discussion and analysis for the financial year ended December 31, 2025. The company, listed under CSE: DOCT, FSE: 7FM0, and OTCQB: DOCKF, provided details about its progress in meeting these requirements. The MCTO was issued to ensure compliance, and the company is actively working to complete the necessary filings.

data.title: LUNYEE Launches 3020 Nova CNC Router to Make Desktop CNC More Powerful and Easier to Start
data.description: Today in Hong Kong, on June 12, 2026, LUNYEE, a well-established desktop manufacturing company with over ten years in the industry, unveiled their latest product - the LUNYEE 3020 Nova CNC Router. This new desktop CNC machine boasts a 710W trim router spindle and features a significantly pre-assembled design, making it user-friendly and efficient.

data.title: Anime "KAGURABACHI"  Unveils Chihiro Rokuhira Character Visual & Character Trailer
data.description: In Tokyo on June 12, 2026, the highly anticipated Anime Kagurabachi, inspired by a popular series from Weekly Shonen Jump, released the character visual and trailer featuring Chihiro Rokuhira. Created by Takeru Hokazono, the manga Kagurabachi is a flagship title, currently being serialized.

data.title: Bitcoin's stability at current levels is surprising experts. Research indicates the floor price may not plummet as expected in past bear markets.
data.description: Recent findings from Galaxy Research indicate that the minimum price of Bitcoin during potential downturns may not reach as low levels seen in past market declines. However, the search for the new price floor is still in progress. This data suggests that Bitcoin's value may not plummet as drastically as in previous bear markets, indicating a more stable outlook for the cryptocurrency.

data.title: Angel Yeast Releases 2025 Sustainability Report as Company Marks 40th Anniversary
data.description: Celebrating its 40th anniversary, Angel Yeast, a top yeast producer, unveiled the 2025 Sustainability Report to commemorate the milestone. Listed on SSE as 600298, the company highlighted its commitment to Stable Development, Strong Momentum, and Green initiatives in the report.

data.title: Breakthrough T1D Celebrates Approval of Tzield for use in Stage 3 Type 1 Diabetes in the US
data.description: In a recent development, Breakthrough T1D, a prominent worldwide organization focusing on type 1 diabetes research and advocacy, has praised the U.S. Food and Drug Administration's (FDA) decision on June 12, 2026, to authorize the use of Tzield for individuals aged 8-17. This approval comes within eight weeks of a significant event.

data.title: Trulieve Makes History As First US Cannabis Stock On NYSE
data.description: Trulieve Cannabis Corp. (NYSE: TRLV) made history by becoming the first U.S. marijuana company to be listed on a major U.S. stock exchange. TRLV stock closed lower after its debut. Trulieve shares now trade on the NYSE as TRLV, previously trading on the OTC as TCNNF and on the CSE as TRUL. Trulieve CEO Kim Rivers attributed the NYSE approval to the Trump administration's reclassification of cannabis to Schedule III for medical use. This move allowed Trulieve to separate its medical and adult-use businesses, facilitating the listing on a senior exchange.

data.title: SpaceX IPO speculation causes fluctuations in Bitcoin values, trading between $60,000–$64,000. Impact debated on July 31 odds.
data.description: Throughout the week, the price of bitcoin fluctuated between $60,000 and $64,000 amid discussions among analysts regarding the influence of SpaceX IPO speculations on cryptocurrency valuations.

data.title: US-Iran deal possible by June 30 as betting odds remain cautious. Tehran requests concessions from Lebanon, raising regional tensions.
data.description: Reports on Friday indicated that Tehran is aiming for Lebanon to make concessions as part of a larger agreement between the US and Iran. This development highlights the delicate situation in the region, with potential implications for the broader Middle East.

data.title: Anterix Inc. Reports Full Fiscal Year 2026 Results
data.description: On June 10, 2026, in Woodland Park, New Jersey, Anterix (NASDAQ: ATEX) revealed their financial outcomes for the fiscal 2026 fourth quarter and the entire fiscal year concluding on March 31, 2026.
